detaileddescription.para: mode of awb control to handle whitebalance during integration of AR082x
mode of awb control to handle whitebalance during integration of AR082x
sensor dvp output H/V sync polarity

briefdescription.para: enable/disable streaming of data once sensor is configured

parameterdescription.para: configuration of the isi camera drv

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.
Return the result of the function call.

briefdescription.para: please increment the version if you add something new to the interface.

detaileddescription.para: This helps upper layer software to deal with different interface versions.
to expand to a (possibly higher) resolution in marvin, the LSBs will be set to zero

briefdescription.para: to expand to a (possibly higher) resolution in marvin, the LSBs will be copied from the MSBs
/formerly known as ISI_BUSWIDTH_10BIT (at times no marvin derivative was able to process more than 10 bit)

detaileddescription.para: Mode, operating mode of the image sensor in terms of output data format and timing data transmission

briefdescription.para: Bayer data with separate h/v sync lines.

detaileddescription.para: already JPEG encoded) h/v sync lines act as data valid signals MIPI
